title: call-agent requires explicit parent_grant and requested_grant
description: call-agent's parent_grant and requested_grant parameters default to empty. Dispatching an agent with tools without explicitly passing these grants results in 'grant violation: tools [X] not in parent grant'. The parameters are Type.Optional in the tool schema but effectively required when the agent spec declares tools.
actual_behavior: Agent with tools: [read] dispatched without parent_grant → 'Agent X grant violation: tools [read] not in parent grant (DEC-0047 clamp at executeAgent boundary)'
expected_behavior: parent_grant should default to the caller's full tool set rather than empty. Or the error message should explicitly state that parent_grant and requested_grant are required when the agent declares tools.
reproduction: 1. author-agent-spec with tools: [read]. 2. call-agent without parent_grant or requested_grant. 3. Observe grant violation.
workaround: Always pass parent_grant and requested_grant explicitly.
